design_philosophy: Mobile-first, premium travel booking experience. Prioritizes immersive visual storytelling through large, edge-to-edge imagery. Uses generous spacing and subtle tactile surfaces rather than flat digital shapes. 'Book My Trip' packages must feel like curated editorial articles rather than generic product listings.

typography.instructions: Import Google Fonts: Outfit (300,400,500,600) and Manrope (300,400,500,600). Never use generic sans-serif for headings.

spacing_and_layout.philosophy: Generous spacing. Mobile screens should feel breathable.

bottom_navigation.style: Fixed at bottom, glassmorphism (backdrop-blur-xl bg-white/85), border-t border-border/light. Ensure pb-24 on main content wrapper to prevent overlap.
bottom_navigation.icons: lucide-react icons, size 24. Active state: brand.primary, Inactive: text.tertiary. Text label is text-[10px] font-medium.

cards_stay.layout: Vertical stack. Image at top (aspect-square or 4/3) with rounded-2xl. Content below image, left-aligned.
cards_stay.image_container: Relative positioning. Wishlist heart icon absolute top-3 right-3, size 20, white stroke or brand.primary fill if active. Add subtle bottom gradient overlay if text sits on image.
cards_stay.text_content: Title (h4), Location (small), Price per night (font-medium text-primary), Rating (flex row with star icon). No card background color or border - rely on image boundaries.

cards_package.layout: Horizontal row for featured, or large vertical card. Aspect ratio 3/4 for image. Feels like an editorial poster.
cards_package.text_content: Destination (h3), Duration badge (e.g., '3N/4D' using overline style), Base Price. 'View Itinerary' CTA.

buttons.primary: bg-brand.primary text-white rounded-full px-6 py-3 font-medium hover:bg-brand.primary_hover transition-colors active:scale-95
buttons.secondary: bg-white text-primary border border-border/medium rounded-full px-6 py-3 font-medium hover:bg-background.muted

search_bar.style: Sticky top, floating pill shape. bg-white floating shadow, rounded-full px-4 py-3 flex items-center gap-3.

booking_bar.style: Fixed bottom (above nav on mobile, or replaces nav on detail pages). Glassmorphism surface, flex justify-between items-center px-4 py-4 border-t border-border/light. Price on left, 'Reserve' primary button on right.

tabs.style: Custom scrollable horizontal list. Active tab has black bottom border or black pill background. Inactive is text-secondary.

home.structure: 1. Floating Search Header. 2. Category Tabs (Stays vs Packages). 3. Featured Horizontal Scroll (Stays). 4. Curated 'Book My Trip' Collections (Vertical list).
home.details: Use Framer Motion for smooth tab switching. Packages should stand out visually from stays (e.g., taller aspect ratio for packages).

explore_listings.structure: Grid of cards. 1 column on mobile, 2 on tablet, 3-4 on desktop.
explore_listings.filters: Scrollable pill buttons below search bar (e.g., 'Beachfront', 'Cabins', 'Trending').

detail_stay.structure: 1. Hero Image Gallery (Swipeable carousel). 2. Title & Ratings. 3. Host Info Row (Avatar + Text). 4. Separator line. 5. Amenities Grid. 6. Calendar/Date Picker inline. 7. Sticky Booking Bottom Bar.
detail_stay.details: Use embla-carousel for images. Calendar uses Shadcn Calendar.

detail_package.structure: 1. Cinematic Hero Image (edge-to-edge). 2. Title & Duration. 3. Itinerary Accordions (Day 1, Day 2). 4. Inclusions/Exclusions list with check/x icons. 5. Sticky Booking Bottom Bar.

profile_and_auth.structure: Clean, minimal forms. Use Shadcn Form, Input, Button. High padding, centered layout for Auth.

hero_essentials.description: Premium flat-lay of travel essentials. Use for Auth screen background, profile headers, or empty states.

media.instructions: Use these images exactly as provided. Map them to 'Stays' (luxury_resorts) and 'Packages' (kerala, himalayas, rajasthan). Do not use placeholder images.

testing.attributes: Add data-testid attributes to all interactive elements (buttons, inputs, tabs, cards). Example: data-testid='tab-stays', data-testid='book-now-button'.

implementation_notes: Use lucide-react for all iconography. Use Shadcn UI for structured components (Dialog, Calendar, Popover, Input) but strip heavy borders and shadows to match the 'Organic & Earthy' premium feel. Ensure the app is entirely usable via mobile dimensions (max-w-md mx-auto or responsive grids that scale up gracefully).
